case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. MARIO ANTONIO INTERIAN TUN

docket_entries.description: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/1/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $566.03 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT TUN, MARIO ANTONIO INTERIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-26-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-26-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-26-2017 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
